response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack/web developer with broad experience, but they lack nearly all core requirements for this embedded security networking role: no native-level Japanese (a hard requirement — languages listed are English, Romanian, German), no demonstrated Linux kernel investigation or modification experience, no embedded networking or LAN-switch background, and no experience with the required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal). Their C experience is limited to a brief 7-month stint over a decade ago, far from the strong C-for-UNIX proficiency required.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured software development career across web, mobile, desktop, and some systems-level work
Low-latency systems experience (DLang, async I/O, high-throughput microservices) shows systems-programming aptitude
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency — a non-negotiable requirement for this role
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, Linux kernel, or network security (MACsec, 802.1X) experience
Minimal C experience; career is centered on TypeScript/Node.js web development
